resources.string: "CookEat AI would like to access your camera to take photos of your ingredients."
"CookEat AI would like to access your photo library to recognize the ingredients you show us."
"This app uses the microphone for voice recognition to understand your available ingredients."
"CookEat uses voice recognition to understand your ingredients and suggest recipes tailored to what you have at home."
"Your data allows us to offer you recipes and advertisements that truly match your tastes."
